title: Polyzoniida
author: Wesener, Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Polyzoniida not belonging to  Rhinotus     CAS BLF 10501 , Madagascar, Province Toamasina, Ambatovy, 18°51'03" S, 048°19'17" E, 1075 m, montane rainforest, colls. Malagasy ant team, 21.iii.2004, sifted litter; 1 specimen.   Remarks:  Small, pale yellow specimen.   FMNH-INS 3977 , Madagascar, Province Antsiranana, R.S. Manongarivo, 20.4 km SW 219º Antanambao, 14.0467 S, 48.4017 E, 1860 m, montane rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 03.xi.1998, Winkler extraction. 1 M.   FMNH-INS 3991 , Madagascar, Province Toamasina, Station Forestiere Tampolo, 10 km NNE Fenoarivo Atn., 17.2833 S, 49.4167 E, 10 m, littoral rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 10.iv.1997, Winkler extraction. 1 M, 1 F.   Remarks:  Specimen ca. 7 mm long, 0.65 mm wide, yellow-brownish with black antennae.   FMNH-INS 4016 , Madagascar, Province Fianarantsoa, R. S. Ivohibe, 6.5 km ESE Ivohibe, camp III, 22.4967 S, 46.9550 E, 1575 m, montane rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 24.–30.x.1997, Winkler extraction. 1 specimen.   Remarks:  Siphonotidae, yellow. Very slender, ca. 5 mm long, 1/ 4 mm wide. One specimen, occurring sympatric with numerous  R. purpureus .   FMNH-INS 4023 , Madagascar, Province Fianarantsoa, R. S. Ivohibe, 8.0 km NE Ivohibe, camp IV, 22.4267 S, 46.9383 E, 900 m, rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 12.–17.xi.1997, Winkler extraction. ~ 30 specimens (?).   Remarks:  Siphonotidae, same species as above?   FMNH-INS 4026 , Madagascar, Province Fianarantsoa, R. S. Ivohibe, 9.0 km NE Ivohibe, camp V, 22.4217 S, 46.8983 E, 1200 m, montane rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 03.–09.xi.1997, Winkler extraction. 2 specimens.   Remarks:  Siphonotidae, same species as above? Sympatric with numerous  R. purpureus .   FMNH-INS 4050 , Madagascar, Province Fianarantsoa, 29 km SSW Ambositra, Ankazomivady, 20.7767 S, 47.1650 E, 1700 m, disturbed montane rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 07.i.1998, Winkler extraction. 3 specimens   Remarks:  Large, surface shiny, 12 mm long, 2 mm wide. Sympatric with numerous  R. purpureus .   FMNH-INS 4110 , Madagascar, Province Toliara, southern Isoky-Vohimena Forest, 22.6833 S, 44.8333 E, 730 m, tropical semi-dry forest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 21.i.1996, Winkler extraction. 2 F.   Remarks:  Sympatric with numerous  R. purpureus .   FMN-INS 8104 , Madagascar, Province Toamasina, 6.3 km S Ambanizana, Andranobe Field Station, 15.6814 S, 49.9583 E, 25 m, rainforest, coll. B. L. Fisher, 14.xi.1993, Winkler extraction. 2 F.   Remarks:  Sharp-edged head, anal segment not completely covering anal valves, body long and wide.
